heading: EXTRATERRITORIAL JURISDICTION OVER CERTAIN OFFENSES
label: 212A EXTRATERRITORIAL JURISDICTION OVER CERTAIN OFFENSES
notes: Amendments2016—, (b)(2), , , 1594, struck out “TRAFFICKING IN PERSONS” before “OFFENSES” in chapter heading and added item 3273.Pub. L. 114–316, § 2(a)(1)130 Stat. 1593Dec. 16, 2016

children.heading: Trafficking in persons offenses committed by persons employed by or accompanying the Federal Government outside the United States
Offenses committed by certain United States personnel stationed in Canada in furtherance of border security initiatives
